evals.name: session-handoff
evals.prompt: Compact this session for handoff. We started implementing a user authentication system, pivoted to OAuth integration, and are now debugging JWT token expiration issues. Files modified: src/auth/middleware.ts, src/auth/oauth.ts, src/config/jwt.ts. Current blocker: tokens expire after 5 minutes instead of 24 hours. AUTO-PILOT is ON.
evals.notes: Tests standard context compaction. Should produce structured output with all required sections, lazy-load references, and preserve critical info.

evals.name: long-session-summary
evals.prompt: Summarize this session for continuation tomorrow. Original goal: Build a data pipeline. Current focus: Fixing schema validation errors in the ingestion step. Decisions made: 1) Use JSON Schema for validation, 2) Batch size 1000 records, 3) Skip invalid records with logging. Constraints: Must process 1M records/hour, max memory 4GB. Open tasks: Add retry logic, implement dead letter queue.
evals.notes: Tests session summary with drift (original vs current focus). Should record both objectives separately and preserve constraints.

evals.name: token-limit-compact
evals.prompt: Context is getting long - compact now. Working on: API rate limiting. Key facts: limit=100req/min per user, Redis cache, sliding window algorithm. Files touched: src/middleware/rateLimit.ts, src/config/redis.ts. No critical blockers. Standard mode.
evals.notes: Tests emergency compaction. Should be concise but complete, with proper structure and lazy-load references.
